---
name: Unsupported school
about: Your school's course-search page isn't recognized

labels: 'enhancement, adapter'
assignees: ''

**School name**
<!-- e.g. Ohio State University -->

**SIS / registration system**
<!-- Pick one if you know:
- [ ] Ellucian Banner SSB9
- [ ] Oracle PeopleSoft Campus Solutions
- [ ] Workday Student
- [ ] Custom in-house
- [ ] Don't know
-->

**Course-search URL pattern**
<!-- e.g. https://myschool.edu/StudentRegistrationSsb/... or paste the actual URL of the search page (no query params with personal info). -->

**Is the page publicly accessible without a school login?**
- [ ] Yes — anyone can use it as a guest
- [ ] No — requires school SSO

**What the page looks like**
<!-- Briefly: does it show a list of classes? A search form? Instructor names listed how? If you can paste a screenshot, that's gold. -->

**Diagnostics**
- Extension version:
- Selected school in popup:
- User agent:
